title: Reckitt India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Reckitt India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
